content.en:
The Wuji Heavenly Emperor kept shuttling, the resentment in his heart rendered the endless territory, and occasionally saw the forces under the command of Taisu Palace, and a single thought directly wiped out a large number of living beings.

But suddenly.

His face changed drastically and he stopped.

"Who?"

Countless golden lights appeared on the body of the Infinite Heavenly Emperor, enveloping the surrounding area.

Rumble!!!!!

The surrounding area was shattered, and time and space were annihilated.

At this moment, a figure was forced out.

"Taibai Sword Master!"

The face of the Wuji Heavenly Emperor changed.

He didn't expect the Taibai Sword Lord to come back.

This is a Supreme Dao Realm who has walked out from the Infinite Domain and walked the path of the Supreme Path, although they are not familiar with it, they have seen it on some occasions.

It's just that the Taibai Sword Lord doesn't pay much attention to him.

Although the Taibai Sword Master did not comprehend the rules of the Sixth Sequence to the Dao, his strength was terrifying, especially his one-move Seventh Sequence to the Dao Divine Power, the Taibai Sword Domain, was enough to kill a group of Sevenfold Dao Realm in an instant, and severely damaged and even killed the weaker Eightfold Dao Realm.

"Taibai Sword Master, I didn't expect you to come back, you can come and sit in our Wuji Heavenly Palace when you have time!"

However, as soon as the Taibai Sword Master's finger moved, an eight-pattern supreme dao weapon long sword fell on his hand, and it was his Taibai dazzling light sword.

"Taibai Sword Master, what does this mean, I didn't offend you, did I?" asked the Infinite Heavenly Emperor.

The Taibai Sword Lord muttered, "Wuji Heavenly Emperor, you really didn't offend me, but I owe Taisu a favor. "

"Taisu Palace wants you to kill me!!"

The Wuji Heavenly Emperor suddenly realized, no wonder Taisu Palace was so fat, he dared to attack the station of Wuji Heavenly Palace, and kill the Supreme Dao Realm of Wuji Heavenly Palace, it turned out that he had found the Taibai Sword Master as a backer.

"Taibai Sword Master, if you want to kill me, once the Innate Origin Alliance knows about it, it will definitely punish you heavily. Wuji Heavenly Emperor said coldly.

"I won't kill you, I'll just seal you!"

The Taibai Sword Lord said lightly.

"Seal me, I'm afraid you don't have that ability!"

As soon as Wuji Heavenly Emperor's words fell, he began to flee directly.

His strength is not as good as that of the Taibai Sword Master, but once he escapes and escapes from the Infinite Domain, even the Infinite Heavenly Emperor will not even want to find him.

However.

The Taibai Sword Lord waved his hand, and the Taibai Sword Domain suppressed it.

And the Wuji Heavenly Emperor didn't want to sit still, he made up for the sixth sequence of the Dao rules with all his body, forming layers of enchantments.

Layers of enchantments were broken, but he still blocked the Taibai Sword Domain.

"Taibai Sword Master, I'm not your opponent, but you haven't comprehended the Sixth Sequence Supreme Dao rules after all, you want to seal me, dream!"

But he also underestimated the Taibai Sword Master.

Burst!

In the void, the body of the Infinite Heavenly Emperor was hit by a sword light and was knocked out of time and space.

Thundered!!!!

The two sides kept fighting, but the whole process was that the Wuji Heavenly Emperor was crushed.

If it weren't for the protection of the Sixth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules, he would have been easily suppressed a long time ago.

"The eightfold Supreme Dao realm that comprehends the rules of the sixth sequence of the Supreme Dao is indeed a turtle shell!" said the Taibai Sword Master with emotion.

He also wanted to comprehend the rules of the Sixth Sequence Supreme Dao, but his cultivation years were short, and he didn't get too good opportunities, and he was suppressed everywhere, and many forces didn't want him to rise.

Therefore, he still has not comprehended the Sixth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules.

Otherwise, just one Infinite Heavenly Emperor can be suppressed with a wave of his hand.

After a while of fighting, the defenses of the Infinite Heavenly Emperor were broken once, and one arm was cut off by the sword light of the Taibai Sword Lord, and it was instantly turned into ashes.

But this injury was nothing to the Infinite Heavenly Emperor, but suddenly, his Heaven and Earth Origin Rebellion reappeared, which of course made him crack all over.

"Backlash!"

The Taibai Sword Lord smiled.

No wonder Taisu Palace wanted to launch a plan in advance, it turned out that the Wuji Heavenly Emperor was counterattacked by heaven and earth.

This bit of backlash is nothing, and it can be recovered quickly, but now it is a big problem in the middle of the battle.

"Taibai Sword Master, don't force me, you leave now, I should have nothing happened, otherwise if I work hard, you won't have a good time. The Infinite Heavenly Emperor roared angrily.

"Oh, it looks like you have hole cards, so let's make a move!"

The Taibai Sword Lord stared at the Wuji Heavenly Emperor with interest, waiting for the Wuji Heavenly Emperor to make a move.

Rumble!!!!!

A terrifying aura permeated the body of the Wuji Heavenly Emperor, which was the breath of the Nine Patterns Supreme Dao Weapon.

"Nine Patterns Supreme Dao Weapon!"

The Taibai Sword Lord was a little surprised that the Wuji Heavenly Emperor actually had such a good thing.

However, the Nine Patterns to the Dao Weapon is refined from the Ninefold Dao Realm, and it contains the fifth sequence of the Ninefold Dao Rules, if the cultivation does not reach the Ninefold Dao Realm, forcibly urging the Nine Patterns to the Dao Weapon, it will not exert much power, and it will be subject to a certain amount of backlash.

The point is that the Wuji Heavenly Emperor has never exposed this Nine Patterns Supreme Dao weapon, obviously he doesn't want to expose it.

After all, many of the Ninefold Supreme Dao Realm will also have a great interest in the Nine Patterns Supreme Dao weapon, and maybe they will come to trouble the Wuji Heavenly Emperor and even assassinate him.

But now there is no way, if he is not exposed, he will be in danger, and his immortality will be sealed.

Rumble!!!!

A terrifying map hovered out.

"Taibai Sword Master, you still want to seal me, no matter how big the price I pay, I have to seal you!"

"This Nine Patterns Supreme Dao Weapon, the Taixuan Floating Diagram, has the effect of suppressing seals, and contains a trace of the Fifth Sequence Supreme Dao rules inside, you retreat now, and make an oath not to divulge my Nine Patterns Supreme Dao weapon, I will still forget it!"

He was also not sure about sealing the Taibai Sword Master, so he didn't want to fight.

However.

The Taibai Sword Master didn't panic at all, and said lightly: "Wuji Heavenly Emperor, you don't think that you can suppress me with a nine-pattern supreme weapon, then you can try." "

Seeing that the Taibai Sword Lord was unmoved, the Wuji Heavenly Emperor could only fight.

Rumble!!!!!

He burned his own origin and urged the Taixuan Floating Diagram.

Suddenly, the Taixuan Floating Diagram continued to spread and grow, trying to contain the Taibai Sword Master.

In the sight of the Taibai Sword Master, the Taixuan Floating Diagram seemed to include all things, boundless, and no matter how much he shuttled and flew, he couldn't fly out.

"You think that my most powerful is the Taibai Sword Domain, however, my most powerful supreme Dao divine power is another move, today Wuji Heavenly Emperor, you are fortunate to see this move!"

Immediately after, the Taibai Sword Lord unleashed his most powerful seventh sequence supreme divine power.

Rumble!!!

Many time and space seemed to stop in an instant, and then an extremely terrifying sword light tore through everything, and also tore apart the Taixuan Floating Sky Diagram.

"That's ......"

The Infinite Heavenly Emperor sensed a wisp of the Sixth Sequence Supreme Dao Rule.

Could it be that the Taibai Sword Master has comprehended the rules of the Sixth Sequence of the Supreme Dao?

No way!

If the Taibai Sword Master comprehends the rules of the Sixth Sequence of the Supreme Dao, he will definitely be able to impact the Sevenfold Supreme Dao Realm, and will not stay in the Sixfold Supreme Dao Realm all the time.

In an instant, he realized.

The Taibai Sword Lord actually triggered the sixth sequence of the Supreme Dao rules between heaven and earth with a single move of the Supreme Dao Divine Power, so that the power of the Supreme Divine Power temporarily reached the level of the Sixth Sequence Supreme Divine Power.
